chain.thought: Explanation: Checking the annual win–loss rows, only the Masters win–loss in 2010 shows 11–6, which means 11 wins—above 10. No other year exceeds 10 wins.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The table has yearly win–loss records. In Grand Slams (row 5), no year exceeds 10 wins (max is 6). In the Masters win–loss row (row 16), 2010 shows 11–6, which is above 10 wins and is the only year with more than 10 wins. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 2010 is correct.
